pages.text: Noah crouches low in the sandbox, a blue shovel carving soft hills.
pages.scene: child kneeling in sandbox, holding blue plastic shovel, small piles of sand around
pages.composition: wide shot, child centered in sandbox, sand piles in foreground

pages.text: A red truck rolls in, wheels crunching, stopping right by his mound.
pages.scene: toy red truck pushed by another child into the sandbox near the sand pile
pages.composition: medium shot, truck entering from right, Noah on left

pages.text: Small hands reach for the shovel, quick and close.
pages.scene: second child leaning forward, hand reaching toward the shovel in Noah’s grip
pages.composition: close-up on both hands near the shovel

pages.text: The sand breaks. The hill falls. Noah’s arm swings fast.
pages.scene: Noah’s arm moving toward the other child, sand pile collapsing beside them
pages.composition: medium shot, action centered, sand falling in foreground

pages.text: A soft thud, then stillness. The truck tips onto its side.
pages.scene: other child stepping back or sitting down, red truck lying sideways in sand
pages.composition: wide shot, truck in foreground, children mid-frame

pages.text: Noah’s hand stays in the air, fingers curled, breath loud in his chest.
pages.scene: child frozen with raised hand, chest lifted, looking toward the other child
pages.composition: medium shot, child centered with empty space around

pages.text: A parent walks over, slow steps, shadow stretching across the sand.
pages.scene: adult approaching from behind, long shadow cast over sandbox
pages.composition: wide shot, parent entering from background, child in foreground

pages.text: They kneel beside him, close enough to touch, but hands resting quiet.
pages.scene: adult kneeling next to child, hands resting on their own knees, both near sandbox
pages.composition: medium shot, both figures side by side, centered

pages.text: The parent turns the truck upright, brushing sand from its wheels.
pages.scene: adult hand lifting the red truck and brushing sand off
pages.composition: close-up on hands and toy truck

pages.text: Noah watches, his arm lowering, fingers slowly opening.
pages.scene: child lowering hand, fingers uncurling, eyes on the truck
pages.composition: medium shot, child centered, truck in lower frame

pages.text: He presses the shovel into the sand, then nudges the truck closer.
pages.scene: child using shovel to push sand, then lightly pushing truck toward the other child
pages.composition: wide shot, both children visible, objects between them

pages.text: The wheels turn again, slow and steady, under the quiet afternoon sun.
pages.scene: two children sitting near each other in sandbox, truck rolling gently between them, parent nearby
pages.composition: wide shot, children low center, parent in background, open sky above
